creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Hi,

I've found the only reliable way how to use devel/ccache4 with poudiere is build devel/ccache4 with

devel_ccache4_SET= STATIC

install it into the host system and add

CCACHE_STATIC_PREFIX=/usr/local

into poudriere.conf. This way poudriere builds everything without loop warnings.
